pageSubtitle: Configure school identity and operational settings
title: School Settings
description: Basic school settings including grade levels, working days, and start time

sections.daysOfWeekDesc: Select the days when school is operational

schoolIdentity.title: School Identity
schoolIdentity.helperText: This name will be displayed in all reports and timetables

academicStructure.title: Academic Structure
academicStructure.description: Select active education levels in the school
academicStructure.helperText: At least one education level must be selected

ramadanMode.title: Ramadan Mode
ramadanMode.description: Shorter periods during the holy month of Ramadan
ramadanMode.infoText: In Ramadan mode, teaching periods are shortened to help students and teachers observe fasting more comfortably.
ramadanMode.hint: Enable to shorten teaching periods during Ramadan

ministryValidation.title: Ministry of Education Validation
ministryValidation.description: Check compliance with Ministry of Education curriculum

off.label: Disabled
off.description: No curriculum validation is performed. Suitable for schools with custom curriculum.

warn.label: Warning
warn.description: A warning is shown if curriculum doesn't match, but saving is still allowed.

strict.label: Strict
strict.description: Saving is only allowed when fully compliant with Ministry of Education curriculum.

ministryValidation.hint: Enable to check compliance with Ministry of Education curriculum

lowResourceMode.title: Low Resource Mode
lowResourceMode.enabledInfo: Low resource mode is active. Schedule generation may be slower but won't slow down your computer.
lowResourceMode.disabledInfo: If your computer slows down during schedule generation, enable this mode.

tips.daysSelection: Saturday to Thursday is recommended for Afghan schools
tips.timezone: Kabul timezone is set for Afghanistan

validation.noDaysSelected: At least one day must be selected
validation.noGradeLevels: At least one education level must be selected
validation.fewWorkingDays: The school week has fewer than five days

errors.revisionConflictDescription: Reload the page to review the latest settings before saving again.
errors.gradeBandInUse: This grade level still has active classes

unsavedChanges.confirmMessage: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
